themes.name: AETHER // NEBULA FLOW
themes.description: Atmospheric translucent UI with gaseous nebula Canvas FX and holographic shimmer accents. Cool blue tones with frosted glass panels.
themes.author: silentoplayz (G30)

themes.name: Amber
themes.description: Warm golden-olive palette reminiscent of polished amber, with a subtle gradient glow.
themes.author: silentoplayz (G30)

themes.name: Amber Command: 1979
themes.description: Vintage CRT terminal aesthetic with amber monochrome tones, scan-line flicker effects, and Geometric Mainframe Canvas FX.
themes.author: silentoplayz (G30)

themes.name: Amethyst
themes.description: Vibrant purple tones inspired by amethyst crystals, with a deep violet gradient.
themes.author: silentoplayz (G30)

themes.name: Apollo // Analogue Futurism
themes.description: NASA-era analogue hardware interface with industrial chassis textures, Vector Telemetry Canvas FX, and muted steel-blue tones.
themes.author: silentoplayz (G30)

themes.name: Astral Projection
themes.description: Deep space glassmorphism with ethereal violet-blue tones, Hyperspace Warp Drive Canvas FX, and luminous translucent panels.
themes.author: silentoplayz (G30)

themes.name: Bio-Digital Synthesis
themes.description: Living bio-organic UI with pulsing borders, Synaptic Network Canvas FX, and vibrant magenta-purple neural tones.
themes.author: silentoplayz (G30)

themes.name: Bioluminescence
themes.description: Deep ocean bioluminescent aesthetic with glowing cyan accents, jellyfish-inspired Canvas FX, and frosted glass panels.
themes.author: silentoplayz (G30)

themes.name: Blue Lightning
themes.description: Electric aurora borealis gradients with Blue Lightning Twinkle Canvas FX and vibrant cerulean-teal tones.
themes.author: silentoplayz (G30)

themes.name: Emerald
themes.description: Rich green hues evoking a dense, jewel-toned forest with matching gradient.
themes.author: silentoplayz (G30)

themes.name: ENTROPY // DATA-STORM
themes.description: Industrial containment UI with corroded amber warning tones, Bit-Stream Corruption Canvas FX, and JetBrains Mono typography.
themes.author: silentoplayz (G30)

themes.name: Four Seasons (Desynced)
themes.description: Nature-inspired seasonal palette with emerald canopy tones, Fireflies Canvas FX, and soft rounded corners.
themes.author: silentoplayz (G30)

themes.name: Kinetic Thermal // Plasma Core
themes.description: Fusion reactor control interface with industrial plating, Plasma Arc Discharge Canvas FX, and cool blue containment tones.
themes.author: silentoplayz (G30)

themes.name: LUMINA // AURORA
themes.description: Premium glassmorphism with layered frosted panels, Fluid Aurora Borealis Canvas FX, and deep indigo-violet tones.
themes.author: silentoplayz (G30)

themes.name: Matrix Rain
themes.description: Hacker terminal aesthetic with phosphor-green grid lines, Matrix code rain Canvas FX, and monochrome dark palette.
themes.author: silentoplayz (G30)

themes.name: Midnight
themes.description: Deep indigo tones with a dark linear gradient backdrop. A refined nocturnal palette.
themes.author: silentoplayz (G30)

themes.name: NEO-TACTICAL // ARCHIVE 01
themes.description: Military console interface with Lidar Topographical Scan Canvas FX, monospace typography, and stealth blue-gray tones.
themes.author: silentoplayz (G30)

themes.name: Neon Cyberpunk (Animated)
themes.description: Neon-drenched cyberpunk UI with animated magenta and cyan glitch accents, matrix data rain Canvas FX, and full color overrides.
themes.author: silentoplayz (G30)

themes.name: Neon Overdrive
themes.description: High-octane cyberpunk UI with intense neon magenta and electric blue accents, glitch-styled animations, and Neon Pulse Canvas FX on a deep midnight backdrop.
themes.author: silentoplayz (G30)

themes.name: Obsidian
themes.description: Pure achromatic darkness with a subtle charcoal-to-navy gradient.
themes.author: silentoplayz (G30)

themes.name: Pink Hues
themes.description: Soft pink and rose color palette with warm pastel accents, gentle floating bokeh Canvas FX, and full color overrides.
themes.author: silentoplayz (G30)

themes.name: Project Singularity
themes.description: Void interface with gravitational distortion effects, Accretion Canvas FX, and deep violet-black tones with phase-shift animations.
themes.author: silentoplayz (G30)

themes.name: Retro Terminal (CRT)
themes.description: Classic green phosphor CRT terminal with VT323 font, scan-line overlay, Matrix code Canvas FX, and authentic retro glow.
themes.author: silentoplayz (G30)

themes.name: Rosé Pine
themes.description: Adaptation of the Rosé Pine color scheme with muted lavender, rose, and pine tones, firefly constellation Canvas FX, and full color overrides.
themes.author: silentoplayz (G30)

themes.name: Ruby
themes.description: Deep crimson and rose tones with a rich red gradient backdrop.
themes.author: silentoplayz (G30)

themes.name: Sapphire
themes.description: Cool blue tones reminiscent of a deep sapphire, with a matching ocean-depth gradient.
themes.author: silentoplayz (G30)

themes.name: Solar Flare
themes.description: Luxury golden UI with warm amber accents, Solar Wind Embers Canvas FX, and rich copper-toned glassmorphism.
themes.author: silentoplayz (G30)

themes.name: Sovereign
themes.description: Architectural material design with Prismatic Caustics Canvas FX, premium glassmorphism panels, and deep navy-indigo tones.
themes.author: silentoplayz (G30)

themes.name: Synthwave 1984
themes.description: Retro-futuristic synthwave aesthetic with neon magenta glow, Perspective Grid Canvas FX, and chrome-styled accents.
themes.author: silentoplayz (G30)

themes.name: The Cyanotype
themes.description: Blueprint-inspired design with architectural grid overlay, deep navy tones, and technical drawing aesthetics. CSS-only — no Canvas FX.
themes.author: silentoplayz (G30)

themes.name: Topaz
themes.description: Warm bronze and sienna tones with an earthy gradient backdrop.
themes.author: silentoplayz (G30)

themes.name: Toxic Nebula // Smog-Core
themes.description: Hazardous atmosphere UI with corrosive green accents, Smog particle Canvas FX, and toxic purple-violet tones with liquid pulse animations.
themes.author: silentoplayz (G30)

themes.name: Wasteland Uplink (Amber)
themes.description: Post-apocalyptic terminal with Radiation Dust Canvas FX, VT323 monospace font, amber phosphor glow, and weathered UI elements.
themes.author: silentoplayz (G30)

themes.name: Windows Hotdog Stand
themes.description: Faithful recreation of the infamous Windows 3.1 Hot Dog Stand color scheme with retro pixel rain Canvas FX.
themes.author: silentoplayz (G30)

canvasFx.name: The Architect (Transparency Optimized)
canvasFx.description: Matrix-style digital rain.

canvasFx.name: Aetheric Flow
canvasFx.description: 2,000+ energy filaments in a dynamic noise field.

canvasFx.name: Geometric Singularity
canvasFx.description: Recursive 3D wireframe lattice warping toward the mouse.

canvasFx.name: Aurora Borealis
canvasFx.description: Flowing, undulating aurora-like ribbons of light with green, teal, and purple hues. Ribbons sway gently using sine waves and respond subtly to mouse position by shifting their flow direction.

canvasFx.name: Bioluminescence
canvasFx.description: Deep sea bioluminescent flashes and drifting organisms. Soft glowing creatures pulse and drift through dark water, trailing tentacles. Mouse presence attracts nearby organisms with a gentle pull.

canvasFx.name: Bioluminescent Plankton
canvasFx.description: 30,000 glowing plankton particles that scatter away from your cursor in panicked swarms, leaving phosphorescent trails. Move your mouse to watch them flee and reform — like disturbing a bioluminescent bay at night. Highly interactive: chase them around the screen!

canvasFx.name: Bit-Stream Corruption
canvasFx.description: A chaotic storm of digital artifacts and ASCII bits that scramble near the cursor.

canvasFx.name: Blueprint Grid
canvasFx.description: Animated technical blueprint with dimension lines, measurement annotations, scan line effect, and interactive crosshair targeting. Mouse creates a crosshair target point with live measurements.

canvasFx.name: Bubble Pop
canvasFx.description: Iridescent bubbles rise from the bottom of the screen. Click or tap them to pop them with a satisfying particle burst! Bubbles wobble, shimmer, and have realistic reflections. Popping creates chain reactions when bubbles are near each other. Score fades in as you pop more. Touch-friendly with generous hit zones.

canvasFx.name: Butterfly Garden
canvasFx.description: A magical garden with colorful butterflies that flutter around. Move your mouse near butterflies to attract them into a gentle, playful swarm. Features realistic wing-flapping, sparkle trails, floating pollen, and tiny flowers.

canvasFx.name: Celestial Orrery
canvasFx.description: A luminous astronomical clockwork floating in space. A pulsing golden star at the center with orbiting gemstone planets leaving glowing trails along engraved brass orbital rings. Planets with moons, gravitational connection threads, twinkling background stars, and decorative gear-tooth accents. Mouse proximity warps orbital speeds; clicks send radial pulse waves.

canvasFx.name: Cell Division
canvasFx.description: Mitosis-like cells that grow, develop a cleavage furrow, and divide into daughter cells. Features nucleus, membrane, cytoplasm, collision detection, and mouse repulsion.

canvasFx.name: Chroma RGB Liquid Grid – Cyber-Neon Edition
canvasFx.description: Elastic neon lattice that breathes, ripples and explodes into RGB when touched.

canvasFx.name: Circuit Board
canvasFx.description: Animated circuit board traces drawn in real-time. Lines travel horizontally and vertically with 90-degree turns. Glowing nodes at junctions/endpoints. Mouse creates signal pulses that race along nearby traces. Subtle cyan/green palette.

canvasFx.name: Comet Shower
canvasFx.description: Comets streak diagonally across the sky with glowing heads and sparkling fading tails. Mouse gravity pulls nearby comets toward the cursor.

canvasFx.name: Constellation Map
canvasFx.description: Randomly placed stars that form connection lines (like constellation patterns) to nearby stars within a threshold distance. Stars slowly drift across the canvas. Mouse creates a gravitational pull that attracts nearby stars. Connection line opacity is based on inter-star distance.

canvasFx.name: Context Mushroom Farm
canvasFx.description: A bioluminescent mushroom grow room that sprouts and fills as your chat conversation grows. Uses the 'context' message type to track token usage. Stages: mycelium threads → tiny pins → growing caps → full clusters → bioluminescent glow → spore release at capacity. Move your mouse to stir floating spores. Includes ambient fog, moisture particles, and glowing fungi.

canvasFx.name: Context Sunflower
canvasFx.description: A single sunflower that grows from a seed as your chat conversation grows. Uses the new 'context' message type to track estimated token usage. The sunflower progresses through stages: soil → sprout → stem & leaves → bud → bloom → full flower. When context is nearly full, petals droop as a visual warning. Move your mouse to sway the flower gently in the breeze.

canvasFx.name: Cymatics
canvasFx.description: Chladni plate vibration pattern simulator. Mouse position controls the vibration frequency modes — X controls horizontal, Y controls vertical. Sand particles are pushed from vibrating antinodes toward still nodal lines, forming beautiful geometric patterns: crosses, stars, diamonds, and complex symmetries. Move the mouse to morph between patterns in real-time.

canvasFx.name: Data Stream
canvasFx.description: Horizontal streams of flowing data represented as small rectangles of varying lengths zipping across the screen. Like watching network traffic visualized. Dim blue/cyan palette. Mouse creates a vortex that curves nearby streams.

canvasFx.name: Digital Fishtank V2
canvasFx.description: A living aquarium with hungry fish that chase and eat food you drop from the surface. Move your cursor to the top of the tank to sprinkle food pellets — fish detect them, race to eat, and do a happy wiggle. Features bezier-curve fish with stripe patterns, leaf-shaped plants, aerator bubble streams, decorative rocks, caustic lighting, depth layering, fish shadows, and an animated water surface.

canvasFx.name: DNA Double Helix
canvasFx.description: A rotating double-helix DNA strand rendered in 3D perspective with base-pair rungs, phosphate backbone nodes, and ambient bio-glow particles. Mouse Y modulates rotation speed; mouse X shifts the helix horizontally.

canvasFx.name: Electric Tendrils
canvasFx.description: Branching electric arcs reach from screen edge anchors toward your mouse cursor. Bolts fork recursively with configurable depth, render in 3 glow layers, and flash with impact circles. Proximity makes anchors fire faster. Ambient mini-arcs crackle between anchors.

canvasFx.name: Ember Dream
canvasFx.description: A warm, hypnotic field of drifting embers and ghostly flame wisps rising through the screen like a campfire viewed in a trance. Features pooled glowing particles with pulsing halos, translucent bezier flame shapes that morph as they rise, ambient glow pools, and a subtle heat shimmer. Mouse creates a wind-dispersal effect; clicks burst new embers outward.

canvasFx.name: Falling Leaves
canvasFx.description: Leaves of various sizes and muted autumn colors (amber, rust, gold, olive) tumble and spiral downward with realistic rotation and swaying. They drift horizontally. Mouse creates an updraft that blows nearby leaves upward.

canvasFx.name: Firefly Meadow
canvasFx.description: Softly glowing firefly particles drifting with organic, non-linear movement. They pulse brighter occasionally with warm yellow/green glow. Mouse creates a gentle attraction zone that fireflies investigate.

canvasFx.name: Fireworks Show
canvasFx.description: An interactive fireworks display! Fireworks launch automatically from the bottom and explode in colorful bursts. Move your mouse around to launch fireworks toward the cursor — move fast to create a dazzling barrage! Features three burst types: spherical, ring, and crackle/glitter with realistic gravity and fading trails.

canvasFx.name: Fluid Ribbons
canvasFx.description: Graceful, flowing silk-like ribbons that trail across the screen in smooth sine/bezier curves. Ribbons taper from thick centers to thin edges, carry color gradients along their length, attract toward the mouse cursor, and glow at intersection points. Uses ring-buffer position history, Float32Array bulk storage, and delta-time animation.

canvasFx.name: Galaxy Forge
canvasFx.description: A spiral galaxy with thousands of orbiting stars. Mouse creates a gravitational well that warps star orbits, pulling tidal streams. Stars have color variation by distance, orbital trails, and a pulsing central core. Move the mouse to sculpt the galaxy in real-time.

canvasFx.name: Glitch Grid
canvasFx.description: A subtle grid overlay that occasionally glitches — random cells flash, scan lines appear and disappear, small sections shift position briefly. Restrained HUD aesthetic with intermittent interference. Mouse proximity increases glitch frequency nearby.

canvasFx.name: Hexagonal Pulse
canvasFx.description: A grid of hexagons that pulse with a ripple effect emanating from

canvasFx.name: Hyperspace Warp Drive
canvasFx.description: A 3D starfield with speed lines. Move the mouse to steer the warp tunnel!

canvasFx.name: HypnoSpiral
canvasFx.description: A slowly fading, hypnotic spiral made of concentric colored rings that rotate and drift outward. Full-spectrum hue cycling with configurable trail fade, ring spacing, and rotation speed.

canvasFx.name: Ice Crystals
canvasFx.description: Hexagonal crystal growth with 6-fold symmetry, prismatic highlights, and mouse-warmth melting.

canvasFx.name: Ink Bloom
canvasFx.description: Ink-drop-like blooms that slowly expand and diffuse at random locations, fading out as they grow. Deep, rich colors (indigo, crimson, emerald) with low opacity. Mouse position influences where new blooms appear.

canvasFx.name: Isometric Terrain
canvasFx.description: An isometric grid of diamond-shaped tiles that undulate like rolling

canvasFx.name: Kaleido Spiral Vortex
canvasFx.description: A kaleidoscopic vortex of rotating radial wedges with pulsing scale wobble and smooth hue cycling. A subtle noise overlay adds texture across the wedge faces.

canvasFx.name: Kaleidoscope
canvasFx.description: Mesmerizing kaleidoscope pattern with mirrored segments and interactive mouse-driven seed point control.

canvasFx.name: Lava Lamp
canvasFx.description: Large, soft, amorphous blobs that slowly rise, merge, split, and sink like a lava lamp. Warm colors (deep reds, oranges, magentas) with very low opacity and heavy blur. Mouse attracts nearby blobs.

canvasFx.name: Liquid Metal
canvasFx.description: A sinuous, mouse-reactive liquid metal surface. Points follow the cursor in a smooth chain, generating an undulating wave with a chrome-like linear gradient fill.

canvasFx.name: Magnetic Field
canvasFx.description: Magnetic field line visualization with multiple dipoles. Field lines are traced via Euler integration from N to S poles with color mapped to field strength. Thousands of iron filing segments orient along the local field direction. Dipoles orbit slowly, causing dynamic topology reconfiguration. Mouse acts as a strong dipole. Uses Float32Array bulk storage, spatial hashing for filings, and delta-time animation.

canvasFx.name: Matrix Rain
canvasFx.description: Classic Matrix digital rain with columns of falling katakana, numbers, and latin characters. Green phosphor glow, brighter leading characters. Mouse proximity accelerates nearby columns.

canvasFx.name: Matrix Rain Japanese
canvasFx.description: Cascading columns of glowing Japanese Katakana characters that fade to transparency. Each column resets at random intervals with a bright green glow that decays as it falls.

canvasFx.name: Morphing Polygons
canvasFx.description: Several large semi-transparent polygons that slowly morph between

canvasFx.name: Mycelium Network
canvasFx.description: An organic fungal mycelium that grows outward from seed points, branching stochastically. Nutrient pulses race along established connections, mature nodes release spores, and the mouse acts as a nutrient source that accelerates nearby growth and attracts branching direction.

canvasFx.name: Nebula Clouds
canvasFx.description: Soft, slowly drifting colored cloud formations using layered circles with very low opacity and large radii. Colors are deep purples, blues, and pinks. Mouse proximity causes nearby clouds to gently disperse.

canvasFx.name: Neural Network
canvasFx.description: Visualization of connected nodes in layers with pulses of light traveling along connections. Nodes glow when activated. The network slowly reorganizes. Mouse adds energy to the nearest node, triggering cascading activations.

canvasFx.name: Northern Lights Curtain
canvasFx.description: Vertical curtains of shimmering aurora light that sway horizontally. Layered vertical bands with colors shifting between green, cyan, and magenta. They shimmer with varying brightness. Mouse position pushes curtains aside.

canvasFx.name: Ocean Waves
canvasFx.description: Layered horizontal wave patterns at different depths, creating an ocean surface viewed from below. Deep blues and teals with varying opacity. Mouse position creates a swell/disturbance in the nearest wave layer.

canvasFx.name: Pixel Rain
canvasFx.description: Pixel-art style rain with blocky, grid-snapped drops, optional splash particles, and glowing trails. Mouse creates pixel splash ripples.

canvasFx.name: Quantum Foam
canvasFx.description: A dense field of 2500 particles that bloom and fade across the full color spectrum, evoking quantum vacuum fluctuations. Particles spawn at random positions, grow outward, and dissolve into transparency.

canvasFx.name: Quantum Particle Tunnel
canvasFx.description: A mesmerizing particle system that simulates quantum tunneling with probabilistic paths, featuring real-time mouse interaction, particle trails, and dynamic color shifts

canvasFx.name: Rain on Glass
canvasFx.description: Raindrops falling with realistic physics — acceleration, subtle streaks, occasional pausing and merging. Larger drops fall slower. Mouse position creates a wind effect that angles the rain.

canvasFx.name: Rainbow Sparkle Trail
canvasFx.description: A magical rainbow sparkle trail that follows your mouse! Every movement creates a burst of colorful, glittery star-shaped particles that twirl, shrink, and fade. The faster you move, the more sparkles appear. Perfect for little ones who love chasing magic around the screen.

canvasFx.name: Retro Sun
canvasFx.description: Synthwave sunset with a glowing semi-circle sun, animated horizontal stripe cutouts, twinkling stars, and a rich gradient sky. Mouse proximity intensifies the sun's glow.

canvasFx.name: Ripple Pond
canvasFx.description: Water ripple interference simulation using a 2D wave equation. Periodic drops create expanding circular ripples that interfere with each other. Mouse acts as a continuous drop source. Optional rain mode for ambient drops.

canvasFx.name: Sacred Geometry
canvasFx.description: Slowly rotating, nested geometric shapes — circles inscribed in

canvasFx.name: Sandstorm
canvasFx.description: Desert sandstorm with particles blowing horizontally through turbulent gusts. Mouse creates a calm shelter zone where particles deflect away. Very atmospheric with layered sand colors and variable opacity.

canvasFx.name: Snow Globe
canvasFx.description: Gentle snowfall with drifting flakes, shimmer sparkles, bottom-edge accumulation, and a mouse-driven swirl wind effect.

canvasFx.name: Solar Wind Embers
canvasFx.description: Floating amber particles that drift upward and react to the sun (mouse).

canvasFx.name: Starfall Pulse
canvasFx.description: Interactive floating embers that react to the user.

canvasFx.name: Starfield Warp
canvasFx.description: A classic starfield effect where stars fly toward the viewer from the center. Stars have trails and speed up when the mouse is near them. Deep space feel with white/blue stars of varying sizes.

canvasFx.name: Stress Test — Particle Inferno
canvasFx.description: A brutal CPU stress test that pushes Canvas FX to its absolute limits. Renders 100,000 particles with real-time physics, per-particle velocity-to-heat color mapping, additive blending, and a multi-pass glow bloom. Particles are violently attracted to the cursor, creating a molten vortex that heats up on impact. A live FPS HUD shows how your system copes.

canvasFx.name: Tactical Liquid Grid
canvasFx.description: An interactive grid of crosshairs that behaves like an elastic fabric.

canvasFx.name: Tap Fireworks
canvasFx.description: Click or tap anywhere to launch a firework burst! Each click spawns a colorful explosion with trails, sparkles, and gravity. Multiple fireworks can exist simultaneously. Hold mousedown to charge up a bigger burst. Works on both desktop (click) and mobile (touch/multi-touch).

canvasFx.name: The Genesis Lattice
canvasFx.description: An emergent cellular automaton rendered as a breathing, 3D interconnected fabric.

canvasFx.name: Thunderstorm
canvasFx.description: Dramatic lightning bolts that fork and flash against a dark sky. Mouse click area triggers a targeted bolt. Background flashes and rumble glow create an immersive storm atmosphere.

canvasFx.name: Topographic Map
canvasFx.description: Smooth, flowing topographic contour lines over a continuously evolving terrain. Bilinear-interpolated gradient fills and organic multi-axis time drift create a fluid, living map feel. Mouse creates a soft hill.

canvasFx.name: Touch Garden
canvasFx.description: An interactive garden where you plant flowers by tapping! Each click/tap plants a flower that grows from a seed. Drag your finger or mouse to scatter seed particles. Multi-touch plants multiple flowers at once. Flowers sway gently in the breeze and butterflies occasionally flutter between them. Perfect for little ones who love to click!

canvasFx.name: VHS Static
canvasFx.description: Authentic VHS tracking effect with rolling tracking bars, random static noise, horizontal jitter, chromatic aberration, scanlines, and mouse-proximity distortion amplification.

canvasFx.name: Voronoi Cells
canvasFx.description: Animated Voronoi diagram where seed points drift slowly. Cell edges

canvasFx.name: Wave Interference
canvasFx.description: Multiple circular wave sources creating beautiful constructive and destructive interference patterns. Waves emanate from fixed points and the mouse position. Subtle monochrome/blue tones.

canvasFx.name: Wireframe City
canvasFx.description: A procedurally generated wireframe cityscape rendered in slight perspective view. Buildings pulse with flickering windows, flying light streaks arc between structures, and a radar-like scanning beam sweeps across the scene. Depth fog fades distant buildings. Mouse acts as a spotlight and scan-beam origin. Uses typed arrays, spatial bucketing, delta-time animation, off-screen culling, and batched draw calls.
